investors: InfoEdge Ventures | Kae Capital | Susquehanna Venture Capital
summary: GobbleCube, an AI startup based in Gurugram building agentic platforms for digital commerce, raised $15 million in a Series A round led by Susquehanna Venture Capital, with participation from InfoEdge Ventures and Kae Capital.
TraqCheck, an HR tech startup, raised $8 million in a Series A round led by IvyCap Ventures with participation from IIFL to expand its AI-driven background screening and sourcing agents in Europe.

investors: ITI Growth Opportunities Fund | Merisis Wealth Trust | PROMAFT Partners | V3 Ventures
summary: The Hosteller raised Rs 150 crore in a Series B round co-led by PROMAFT Partners and V3 Ventures, with participation from ITI Growth Opportunities Fund and Merisis Wealth Trust, to fund expansion of its hostel network across India.

Cohoma Coffee, a specialty coffee roaster and machine manufacturer, raised Rs 5 crore in a seed round led by Inflection Point Ventures with participation from Swishin VC to scale manufacturing and expand internationally.

Polaris Smart Metering Private Limited secured Rs 710 crore (≈$80‑$86 million) in financing from British International Investment to deploy 2.2 million smart meters in West Bengal and expand its AMI footprint.

investors: IIFL. Aliste Technologies | PROMAFT Partners | YourNest VC
ITI Growth Opportunities Fund | Merisis Wealth Trust | PROMAFT Partners | V3 Ventures | family offices
summary: The Hosteller raised Rs 150 crore (approximately $16 million) from a group of investors including PROMAFT Partners and V3 Ventures.
Unbound, a men's personal care brand, raised Rs 8 crore in a funding round led by Fireside Ventures to launch its first product range in India.
The government announced a Rs 10,000 crore Fund of Funds 2.0 to support deep‑tech, manufacturing and early‑growth startups through segmented AIFs.
Masters’ Union launched a Rs 100 crore early‑stage investment platform, MU Ventures, to fund founders under 25 across various tracks.
